summary: Iteration 88 - Frontend Testing for Wealth Command. Verified: 1) Execution tab in Adviser Mode only contains 'Batch Execute' (Trading and Hybrids removed), 2) TransactionModeler has 'Add to List' button with data-testid='add-to-list-btn', 3) Transaction items display with delete buttons, 4) Delete functionality removes transactions from the list.

issues: Compliance modal appears on page load/navigation. Requires checkbox acknowledgment + accept button click to dismiss.

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Layout.jsx adviserBaseNav Execution group (lines 188-195) contains only 'Batch Execute' - Trading and Hybrids are NOT present
PASS: TransactionModeler.jsx has 'Add to List' button with data-testid='add-to-list-btn' at line 1449
PASS: Transaction items display with data-testid='transaction-item-{id}' pattern at lines 784-786
PASS: Delete buttons have data-testid='delete-transaction-{id}' pattern at lines 789-795
PASS: addToTransactionList() function at line 622 correctly adds transactions to state
PASS: removeTransaction() function at line 692 correctly removes transactions by ID
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 88 verified navigation and TransactionModeler functionality. To test Execution tab: Switch to Adviser Mode, the Execution group will only show 'Batch Execute'. To test TransactionModeler: Navigate to /transaction-modeler, close compliance modal (checkbox + accept), click 'Add to List' to add transaction, verify transaction appears with delete button, click delete to remove.

execution_tab_adviser_mode.verification: adviserBaseNav Execution group at lines 188-195 contains only { path: '/batch-execution', label: 'Batch Execute' }. No Trading or Hybrids items. Confirmed via code review and UI testing.

add_to_list_button.verification: Button found with data-testid='add-to-list-btn' at line 1449. Button triggers addToTransactionList() function at line 632.

transaction_items_display.verification: Transaction items render with data-testid='transaction-item-{id}' pattern. Each item shows name, amount, and delete button. Verified via UI testing - 'Vanguard Australian Shares Index ETF $100.0K' displayed correctly.

delete_button_functionality.verification: Delete buttons have data-testid='delete-transaction-{id}' pattern. Clicking delete button removes transaction from list via removeTransaction() function. Toast notification 'Transaction removed' confirms deletion.
